A partial authorization is just like, if I swipe, this is for my team's benefit too.
If I swipe my card and I have insufficient funds, it will pay off just the amount that it can, and then it'll ask me for more money.
So if I'm like at a restaurant and I have got $20 in my account, I've got a $100 bar bill, it'll run the card, take that $20 out, and then kick out another $80 bar bill.
That's really good if you're the merchant because instead of...

Instead of just rejecting the transaction and the person not being able to complete it, you've already gotten a portion of their money and now you ask them for another payment method to finish it off.
